projectDescription: An open specification for development containers that defines how to use a container as a full-featured, reproducible development environment.
keyFeatures: devcontainer.json format for defining reproducible development environments
Dev Container Features: self-contained, shareable units of tooling and configuration
Dev Container Templates: pre-built environment configurations for common tech stacks
Support for image-based, Dockerfile-based, and Docker Compose-based containers
Image metadata via devcontainer.metadata label for prebuilt container images
OCI registry-based distribution for Features and Templates
Cross-tool support: VS Code, GitHub Codespaces, IntelliJ, and more
Port forwarding, environment variable management, and user configuration
Host requirements specification for CPU, memory, and GPU
publicApiSurface: devcontainer.metadata — container image label for prebuilt images
devContainerFeature.schema.json — JSON schema for Feature metadata
initializeCommand — lifecycle hook: runs on host during initialization
onCreateCommand — lifecycle hook: runs inside container on first creation
updateContentCommand — lifecycle hook: runs inside container when content updates
postCreateCommand — lifecycle hook: runs after container creation
postStartCommand — lifecycle hook: runs each time container starts
postAttachCommand — lifecycle hook: runs when tool attaches to container
features — devcontainer.json property for specifying Dev Container Features
customizations — devcontainer.json property for tool-specific configuration
